---
title: "Contact"
---

Thank you for visiting my portfolio. Please feel free to get in touch regarding opportunities, projects, or collaboration.

::: {.contact-card}

## Get in Touch

- **Email:** [oliveedeko@gmail.com](mailto:oliveedeko@gmail.com)
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/oliveedeko](https://www.linkedin.com/in/oliveedeko)
- **GitHub:** [github.com/oliveedeko](https://github.com/oliveedeko)

## CV
[View CV](files/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[Download CV PDF](files/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

:::
